message.sharkengine.assembly_fail_contac: Assembly blocked: world contact at %s points.
message.sharkengine.assembly_fail_thrust: No thrusters detected – add at least one to launch.
message.sharkengine.assembly_fail_core: Connect four blocks around the wheel (%s/4).
message.sharkengine.disassembly_partial: Ship disassembled partially (%s blocks placed, some obstructed).
message.sharkengine.builder_open: Builder mode ready. Review highlighted blocks before launch.
screen.sharkengine.builder.title: Airship Builder
screen.sharkengine.builder.instructions: Place eligible blocks and thrusters. Red highlights must be removed before launch.
screen.sharkengine.tutorial.welcome.body: Use this steering wheel to build powerful vehicles.
screen.sharkengine.tutorial.mode_selecti: Pick how you'd like to travel. More modes arrive soon.
screen.sharkengine.tutorial.mode.disable: Other modes unlock in future updates.
Attach blocks to each side of the wheel, add a thruster, and place the bow (front marker) at the front.
screen.sharkengine.tutorial.ready.title: Vehicle Ready
screen.sharkengine.tutorial.ready.body: All requirements met. Press Launch to take off!
WASD to steer, Space to rise, Shift to descend. Monitor fuel and weight warnings.
message.sharkengine.assembly_fail_no_bug: No bow block found – place exactly one bow as front marker.
message.sharkengine.assembly_fail_multi_: Configuration error: Multiple bow blocks found (%s). Only one allowed.
message.sharkengine.assembly_fail_bug_in: Bow must be on the outer edge – currently placed inside.
message.sharkengine.no_fuel: ⚠ Engine out! Ship is falling – land or refuel.
message.sharkengine.too_heavy: ⚠ Ship too heavy to fly (61+ blocks)!
hud.sharkengine.onboarding.title: Shark Engine V4 · Quick Flight Guide
hud.sharkengine.onboarding.movement: Movement: W = forward, A/D = turn. Build momentum before climbing.
hud.sharkengine.onboarding.vertical: Vertical: Space rises, Shift descends. Heavy ships climb slower.
hud.sharkengine.onboarding.fuel: Fuel: Green = safe, Yellow = low, Red = critical. Refuel before long flights.
hud.sharkengine.onboarding.dismiss: Press X to dismiss this card.
message.sharkengine.not_pilot: You are not the pilot of this ship.
